title: Voxel World Builder
description: Build 3D isometric worlds with 8 block types — place, paint, erase, rotate the camera, and export your scene as PNG.
concept: A fully interactive 3D voxel editor that renders an isometric world entirely in Canvas 2D. Eight distinct block types (stone, grass, wood, sand, metal, lava, ice, glass) can be placed, painted, or erased on a configurable grid. The camera orbits with drag, zooms with scroll or pinch, and the depth-sorted painter's algorithm keeps all faces correctly layered. Your world auto-saves to localStorage.
features: 8 block types with distinct isometric shading (top/left/right faces)
Place, Erase, Paint modes + right-click erase
Drag to orbit camera, scroll/pinch to zoom
Seeded starter scene on first visit

interaction.mouse: drag to rotate camera, scroll to zoom
interaction.click: left-click to place/erase/paint block, right-click to erase
interaction.touch: drag to rotate, pinch to zoom, tap to place
